title: 菊花賞の後に・堕ちゆく

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having lost the Kikuka Sho, Admire Vega blames
herself for focusing too much on her own feelings
and forgetting her promise to her sister.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although I had been considering putting her in
the Senior Spring Triple Crown, seeing her now
makes me decide on the Takarazuka Kinen so
that she'll have more time to rest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Narita Top Road notices Admire
Vega's distress, but when she offers to help, she is
quickly brushed off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Admire Vega has abandoned her rivalries
and love of racing, choosing solitude instead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In her mind, it's the only way she can remain
faithful to her sister. She takes off into the
darkness alone.
